properties.name: zeta.worker.enabled
properties.description: Master switch to activate Worker mode for cluster-wide hot key detection.

properties.name: zeta.worker.routing.app-name
properties.description: Logical application name (tenant discriminator) for queue routing.

properties.name: zeta.worker.messaging.report-exchange
properties.description: Direct exchange name for app-to-Worker report messages.

properties.name: zeta.worker.messaging.broadcast-exchange
properties.description: Fanout exchange name for broadcasting HOT/COOL decisions.

properties.name: zeta.worker.messaging.heartbeat-exchange
properties.description: Topic exchange name for epoch-driven structured worker heartbeats.

properties.name: zeta.worker.report-consumer.concurrent-consumers
properties.description: Number of concurrent consumers for the report queue. Minimum 1.

properties.name: zeta.worker.report-consumer.prefetch-count
properties.description: Prefetch count per consumer; balances throughput vs memory pressure.

properties.name: zeta.worker.sliding-window.duration-ms
properties.description: Sliding window duration in milliseconds for QPS tracking.

properties.name: zeta.worker.sliding-window.slices
properties.description: Number of time slices within one sliding window. Minimum 1.

properties.name: zeta.worker.threshold.hot-threshold
properties.description: Absolute hot-key threshold; ≤0 disables absolute threshold (uses ratio-based).

properties.name: zeta.worker.threshold.hot-threshold-ratio
properties.description: Hot-key threshold as fraction of estimated global QPS (1%).

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.sm-duration-ms
properties.description: State-machine base window duration in milliseconds. Each slice = sm-duration-ms / sm-slices.

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.sm-slices
properties.description: Number of slices within the state-machine window. Minimum 1.

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.confirm-duration-ms
properties.description: Total duration in milliseconds for HOT confirmation (confirmCount = ceil(confirmDurationMs / sliceMs)).

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.cool-duration-ms
properties.description: Duration in milliseconds a key must stay below threshold to be considered COLD.

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.pre-cool-grace-ms
properties.description: Grace period in milliseconds at end of cool-down for silent revival.

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.evict-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in ms for evicting stale sliding-window and state-machine state.

properties.name: zeta.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.qps-change-tolerance
properties.description: QPS change tolerance before threshold update (±50%).

properties.name: zeta.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.learning-period-ms
properties.description: Learning period in milliseconds for baseline QPS estimation.

properties.name: zeta.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.hot-threshold-ratio
properties.description: Dynamic hot threshold ratio relative to baseline QPS.

properties.name: zeta.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.recalculate-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between dynamic threshold recalculations.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.top-k
properties.description: Worker-side HeavyKeeper Top-K capacity.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.width
properties.description: Worker-side Count-Min Sketch width.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.depth
properties.description: Worker-side Count-Min Sketch depth.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.decay
properties.description: Worker-side HeavyKeeper decay factor.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.min-count
properties.description: Worker-side minimum frequency count.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heartbeat.ping-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between structured heartbeat sends.

properties.name: zeta.worker.bayesian.prior-mean
properties.description: Prior mean of log-frequency distribution (ln(10) — key with ~10 accesses per window is neutral).

properties.name: zeta.worker.bayesian.prior-std
properties.description: Prior standard deviation; larger = more data-driven, smaller = anchored to prior.

properties.name: zeta.worker.bayesian.likelihood-std
properties.description: Base likelihood standard deviation; adjusted dynamically by CV for traffic-adaptive confidence.

properties.name: zeta.worker.fast-lane.enabled
properties.description: Bypass Bayesian state machine; broadcast on sliding-window threshold only.

properties.name: zeta.worker.fast-lane.rules[].key-pattern
properties.description: Key pattern for fast-lane rule matching.

properties.name: zeta.worker.fast-lane.rules[].threshold
properties.description: Count threshold for fast-lane rule; matched keys exceeding this are promoted immediately.

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.enabled
properties.description: Enable periodic TopK snapshot to Redis (opt-in).

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.persist-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between TopK snapshots.

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.top-k-count
properties.description: Number of top keys to persist per snapshot.

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.redis-key-prefix
properties.description: Redis key prefix; final key = prefix + appName + ':' + nodeId.

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.ttl-days
properties.description: TTL in days for persisted TopK data in Redis.
